resume_data.raw_text:
Dnyanesh Sameer Patil
dnyaneshpatil706@gmail.com — +91 9511743263 — LinkedIn — GitHub
Summary
Aspiring Data Scientist with strong foundation in Machine Learning, Data Analytics, and Python programming.
Certified in Google Data Analytics and Machine Learning with practical experience in predictive modeling, data
visualization, and building data-driven applications. Skilled in SQL, NLP, and statistical analysis with an interest in
solving real-world business problems using data.
Education
Bachelor of Engineering – Information Technology Expected 2026
MET Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik
CGPA: 8.1 / 10
Technical Skills
• Programming: Python, SQL, JavaScript
• Data Science: Machine Learning, NLP, Statistics, Feature Engineering, Data Cleaning
• Libraries/Frameworks: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn
• Visualization Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Excel
• Databases: MySQL, MongoDB Tools: Jupyter Notebook, Git
• Cloud & Others: AWS Basics, REST APIs, Cybersecurity Fundamentals
Experience
Software Development Intern – Sumago Infotech 3 Months
• Developed and optimized REST APIs while ensuring secure data handling using JWT authentication.
• Collaborated on full-stack projects, worked with databases, and improved backend performance.
Projects
Credit Card Fraud Detection – Machine Learning
• Built classification models to detect fraudulent transactions using preprocessing, scaling, and imbalance handling.
• Evaluated performance using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and ROC-AUC metrics.
AI-Powered Resume Screener – NLP
• Designed an ATS-friendly resume analyzer using TF-IDF and keyword ranking techniques.
• Implemented NLP preprocessing and scoring system using Python and Scikit-learn.
E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
• Developed interactive dashboards to analyze sales trends, revenue, and customer behavior.
• Utilized Tableau and SQL for visualization and business insight generation.
Certifications
Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate – Google
Machine Learning Certification
AWS Cloud Fundamentals
Cybersecurity Certification – Udemy
